# TextEditor

A Tiptap-backed rich text editor with a composable toolbar, bubble menu, and character counter.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/text-editor
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="text-editor" example={0} code={`<TextEditorDemo />`} />

```tsx
<TextEditorDemo />
```

## Props

### `<TextEditor.BubbleMenu>`

| Prop        | Type        | Required | Default | Description                               |
| ----------- | ----------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `children`  | `ReactNode` | Yes      | -       | -                                         |
| `className` | `string`    | No       | -       | -                                         |
| `label`     | `string`    | No       | -       | Accessible name for the floating toolbar. |

### `<TextEditor.ColorButton>`

| Prop     | Type                     | Required | Default | Description                                               |
| -------- | ------------------------ | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `target` | `'color' \| 'highlight'` | No       | -       | \`color\` tints the text; \`highlight\` paints behind it. |
| `colors` | `readonly string[]`      | No       | -       | -                                                         |
| `label`  | `string`                 | No       | -       | -                                                         |

### `<TextEditor.Content>`

| Prop   | Type           | Required | Default | Description |
| ------ | -------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `size` | `'sm' \| 'md'` | No       | -       | -           |

### `<TextEditor.EmojiButton>`

| Prop    | Type                | Required | Default | Description |
| ------- | ------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `emoji` | `readonly string[]` | No       | -       | -           |
| `label` | `string`            | No       | -       | -           |

### `<TextEditor.MarkButton>`

| Prop    | Type                 | Required | Default | Description                                     |
| ------- | -------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `mark`  | `keyof typeof MARKS` | Yes      | -       | -                                               |
| `label` | `string`             | No       | -       | Localized label override (defaults to English). |

### `<TextEditor.Root>`

| Prop       | Type             | Required | Default | Description |
| ---------- | ---------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `editor`   | `Editor \| null` | Yes      | -       | -           |
| `size`     | `'sm' \| 'md'`   | No       | -       | -           |
| `invalid`  | `boolean`        | No       | -       | -           |
| `disabled` | `boolean`        | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant | Values     |
| ------- | ---------- |
| `size`  | `sm`, `md` |
